items.name: Plush Edward
items.description: Edward is a mischievous little demon plush, cloaked in vivid crimson with piercing yellow eyes that seem to follow you wherever you go. His long golden horns curve upward like lightning frozen in midair, hinting at the chaos and charm he brings. Equal parts cute and sinister, Edward is the perfect companion for Roblox players who like their accessories with a devilish twist.

items.name: Winter Brigade Cap (Camo)
items.description:
You like to say you fought with the Cataphracts in the assault at the trenches near Dubauis, and it wouldn’t be far from the truth. Nobody’s sure if they really did give you this hat as a token of gratitude for saving their Lord Commander, but you’re the most veteran guy in the line, so who’s going to call you out on it?

items.name: Alien
items.description:
Visit us for more cool stuff!  https://www.roblox.com/groups/34376130/Metaskins-Creations-UGC#!/about
Explore the Galaxy with the Ultimate Alien Costume! 

Get ready to take your Roblox adventures out of this world with this awesome alien costume! Perfect for space explorers, sci-fi fans, and anyone who loves to imagine life beyond Earth. This cool outfit features glowing eyes, extraterrestrial details, and a futuristic vibe that will make you stand out in any game. Whether you’re flying a UFO or just hanging out with your intergalactic friends, this alien costume is a must-have for all adventurers!

items.description:

UGC Creators are free to make accessories for these vests (patches, badges, etc.) but are not allowed to re-upload my assets. A DMCA Takedown Request will be issued to anyone who steals my assets.
